The '''''Star Quest''''' was a [[Suwantek Systems]] [[TL-1800 transport]] that was owned and operated by the [[Riileb (species)|Riileb]] [[Tere Metallo]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|7|Passages}}
*{{JournalCite|6|Rendezvous with Destiny|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
